economic_notes: Band owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which carries a 13.34% investment in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership. Audit qualified due to inability to obtain GILP financial statements.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain financial statements of Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), preventing disclosure of investment summary and confirmation of investment balance. Prior year comparative figures were restated due to correction of accounting error: cash understated and accounts payable understated by $476,828 in 2023. As of July 16, 2023, Tsiigehtchic Charter Community is no longer a related party; $879,788 owing to them reclassified to accounts payable. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated on face of balance sheet in provided text. Net debt of $358,210 reported. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue ($777,109) minus CIRNAC ($406,678) minus GNWT ($337,936) = $32,495.
